subject: Gaming
title: The International: Dota's Crown Jewel
description: One-minute skill: The International: Dota's Crown Jewel.

hook.text: The International is the richest annual esports event. Its prize pool has exceeded $40 million.

buildup.text: Valve launched TI in 2011 with a $1.6 million prize pool—massive at the time.

discovery.text: The Battle Pass crowdfunding model let fans grow the prize pool every year. Community investment soared.

twist.text: Winning teams often disband shortly after. The pressure and money fracture relationships.

climax.text: TI proved that fan funding could create prize pools that rival traditional sports championships.

punchline.text: Forty million dollars. Funded by fans. Then champions split apart.

quiz.question: What often happens to teams after winning The International?
options: They frequently disband due to pressure and money conflicts
